name: Oven Drying Fresh Herbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Set oven temperature to 150 degrees Fahrenheit (or the equivalent in your oven's scale).
2. Line cookie sheets with parchment paper.
3. Arrange herbs in a single layer on the prepared cookie sheets.
4. Bake the herbs for approximately one hour, or until they are completely dry and crumbly when touched.
5. Once done baking, carefully remove the herbs from the oven and allow them to cool completely. Crumble the dried herbs by hand and store them in dark containers away from moisture, heat, and light.
I use this method to dry my herbs when I have a large harvest. The herbs remain fresh for up to 2 years when stored properly. Lynn Thomas
